panels.alt: A bright dawn over Luma Isle where every lantern has been deliberately covered
panels.caption: Luma Isle should be shining by now.

panels.alt: A carefully tended dragon egg waiting in a cold, unlit Hatchery cradle
panels.caption: Even the Hatchery has forgotten dawn.

panels.alt: Miri stepping from behind a lantern post with one hand raised in warning
panels.caption: Miri: “Careful. The centre hears fear faster than footsteps.”
At the Island Heart, Noctyra is still warning someone.

panels.alt: Miri inviting the expedition toward one small newly lit Hatchery lantern
panels.caption: Miri: “Start small. Help us wake one gentle place.”
